package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for save_for_single_column_change: GORM Save used for a single-column update instead of a targeted Update call.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: data_access; severity: contextual.
type Rule294PositiveRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario294Positive(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	for _, id := range ids {
		updates := map[string]any{"seen": true, "id": id}
		if err := db.Where("id = ?", id).Preload("Items").Updates(updates).Error; err != nil {
			return err
		}
	}
	return db.Order("created_at desc").Find(&[]Rule294PositiveRecord{}).Error
}
